name: Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd provides IT solutions to financial and non-financial customers in China. It offers software products, such as credit management, risk management, trust management, P2P online loan, and supply chain financing systems, as well as business consulting, system development and implementation, data services, and other services. In addition, the company provides cloud platform. Shanghai Amarsoft Information & Technology Co.,Ltd is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
